# GitHub Labels

| Label | Purpose |
|--------|----------|
| feature | New feature |
| bug | Bug fix |
| enhancement | Improve existing functionality |
| frontend | React / UI |
| backend | Google Apps Script |
| data | Google Sheets |
| documentation | Documentation |
| design | UI / UX |
| testing | QA |
| launch | Deployment |
| priority-high | Critical |
| priority-medium | Important |
| priority-low | Nice to have |
